posts.author: Thomas-Omnitas (Thomas Karlsson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @ropax!
You are in good hands with @rob and Omnidea.
If you for any reason want an alternative we at Omnitas Consulting are willing to help, We are based in Sweden but work with companies internationally.

Before we can give any quote or suggestion we do need bore details about the problem and what you want to achieve.
